assertionResults.fullName: createMutateMinimalEnvelope middleware tasks.add — returns {count, ids[], status} by default
assertionResults.title: tasks.add — returns {count, ids[], status} by default

assertionResults.fullName: createMutateMinimalEnvelope middleware tasks.add-batch — returns {count, ids[]} for the entire batch
assertionResults.title: tasks.add-batch — returns {count, ids[]} for the entire batch

assertionResults.fullName: createMutateMinimalEnvelope middleware tasks.update — returns {count, ids[], changes, status}
assertionResults.title: tasks.update — returns {count, ids[], changes, status}

assertionResults.fullName: createMutateMinimalEnvelope middleware tasks.complete — returns {count, ids[], status, completedAt}
assertionResults.title: tasks.complete — returns {count, ids[], status, completedAt}

assertionResults.fullName: createMutateMinimalEnvelope middleware tasks.delete — returns {count, ids[], status}
assertionResults.title: tasks.delete — returns {count, ids[], status}

assertionResults.fullName: createMutateMinimalEnvelope middleware --full opt-out (global) restores the full record for every mutate op
assertionResults.title: --full opt-out (global) restores the full record for every mutate op

assertionResults.fullName: createMutateMinimalEnvelope middleware honours a per-request _projection override even when the global flag is set
assertionResults.title: honours a per-request _projection override even when the global flag is set

assertionResults.fullName: createMutateMinimalEnvelope middleware prevalidates projected --field paths before invoking the mutation
assertionResults.title: prevalidates projected --field paths before invoking the mutation

assertionResults.fullName: createMutateMinimalEnvelope middleware allows deprecated /data/ids/0 field paths through to the projected envelope
assertionResults.title: allows deprecated /data/ids/0 field paths through to the projected envelope

assertionResults.fullName: createMutateMinimalEnvelope middleware returns partial success with created IDs when post-write projection fails
assertionResults.title: returns partial success with created IDs when post-write projection fails

assertionResults.fullName: createMutateMinimalEnvelope middleware preserves meta.suggestedNext set by the upstream handler (T9921)
assertionResults.title: preserves meta.suggestedNext set by the upstream handler (T9921)

assertionResults.fullName: createMutateMinimalEnvelope middleware does not project ops absent from MUTATE_PROJECTION_PLANS
assertionResults.title: does not project ops absent from MUTATE_PROJECTION_PLANS

assertionResults.fullName: createMutateMinimalEnvelope middleware stamps meta.mutateProjection on error envelopes too
assertionResults.title: stamps meta.mutateProjection on error envelopes too
